page_content:
Formerly: EDCP669 and EDCP688.

EDCP697 Multicultural Issues in Counseling Psychology (3 Credits) Exploration of knowledge, attitudes and skills for providing counseling and psychological services to culturally diverse populations. Prerequisite: Only open to Counseling Psychology majors.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCP697, EDCP699, or PSYC697.
